Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: dresses by function [300221276], dresses (garments) [300046159], main garments [300209263], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: ceremonial costume [300210387], costume by function [300212133], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

wedding clothes [300411762], costume by function [300212133], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Dresses worn by brides during the wedding ceremony, in many styles and colors, often having a train.
Vestido que llevan las novias durante la ceremonia nupcial, en muchos estilos y colores, y que tienen con frecuencia cola.
Japonnen die door bruiden worden gedragen tijdens het huwelijk en het daaropvolgende feest; in vele stijlen en kleuren, soms met een sleep.
Kleid, das von einer Braut während der Hochzeit getragen wird; gibt es in vielen Stilen und Farben, oft mit einer Schleppe.

Source.Source_ID: 2000007861/Cunnington et al., Dictionary of English Costume (1965)

Term_Source.Page: Ann Coleman, Curator of Textiles, Houston Museum of Fine Arts, 11/94

Source.Source_ID: 2000032221/Cunnington and Lucas, Costume for Births, Marriages, and Deaths (1978)
